title: Clinical epigenomics for cardiovascular disease: Diagnostics and therapies.
author: Fischer MA Vondriska TM
content: S-EPMC8330446 PMC8330446 Clinical epigenomics for cardiovascular disease: Diagnostics and therapies. The study of epigenomics has advanced in recent years to span the regulation of a single genetic locus to the structure and orientation of entire chromosomes within the nucleus. In this review, we
